xml.source: Timothy Blaine Price (2010), The Old Saxon Leipzig Heliand manuscript fragment (MS L), Phd thesis, UC Berkeley, https://escholarship.org/uc/item/19k1z5h8, segmentation based on appendix and Sec. 4.2.1.2: whenever a gap is inserted *in either of these*, we assume a space, for the reading of characters, we follow Sec 4.2.1.2, as we see this to be a revision of an earlier draft preserved in the appendix
xml.comment: fragments of P, aligned with M or C

v.m: éndi anthana heleanduuili hluttrogilobeaN .
v.c: endi anthena uuili hluttro giloƀean
v.p: uuili hluttro giloƀoN .

v.m: leftean isleara. T ho niuuas lang tethiu
v.c: lestean is lera . Thuo niuuas lang ti thiu
v.p: LesteaN is lera thuo Niuua lang afte[r

v.m: that im fon galilea giuuet godes egan barn
v.c: that him fan galilea giuuet godes egan barn
v.p: ]at im fan [g...] giuuet . godes egaN barn.

v.c: Diurlic drohtines sunu dopi suokean
v.p: diolic drohtinas suno dope suokeaN.

v.c: uuasim thuo anis uuastme uualdandes barn
v.p: u uas im thuo in is uuastma uuldandas barn .

v.m: al so he mi d thero thi odu thri ti g habdi
v.c: all so hie mid thero thiedo thritig haƀdi
v.p: alla so hie miđ thero thiođo thritig habdi

v.m: ui ntro an isuueroldi . tho hean i s uui lleon quam
v.c: uuintro anis uueroldi Thuo hie anis uuilleon
v.p: uuintro aN is uueroldi thuo hie an is uuilleaN qua .

v.m: thar i ohannes an i ordanes strome
v.c: thar iohannes aniordana strome
v.p: thar giohannes aN giordana stroma.

v.m: allan langandag li udi manage
v.c: allan langan dag liudi managa
v.p: allan langana dag liodi managa.

v.m: dopte di urli co . Rehto sohetho i sdrohti n gi sah
v.c: dopta diurlico . Reht sohie thuo is drohtin gisah
v.p: dopta diorlico. reht so hie thuo isdrohtiN gisah .

v.m: holden herron . so uuari m i s hugi bli di
v.c: holdan herron so uuarthim is hugo bliđi
v.p: holdaN herraN so uuarđ im is hugi bliđi .

v.m: thes i m thea uui lleo gi stod. endi sprac i m tho mi d i suuordun to
v.c: thes im thie uuillo gistuod endi sprak im thuo mid is uuordon to
v.p: thes im thie uuilleo gistuod eNdi sprak miđ is uuordoN tuo .

v.m: suui do god gumo. Iohannes te kri ste .
v.c: suithuo . guod gumo iohannes te criste

v.m: Nu cumi s thu te mi nero dopi drohti n fromi n
v.c: Nu cumis thu teminero dopi drohtin fromin
v.p: Nu cumis thu te minero dopi drohtiN fromiN

v.m: thi od gumono bezto . so scolde i c tethi nero duaN .
v.c: thied gumo best soscolda ik te thinero duan .
v.p: thiođ gumoNo bezto so scolđa ik te thinaro doaN .

v.m: huuand thubi st allaro cuni ngo crafti gost . kri st selbo gi bod
v.c: huand thu bist allero cuningo craftigost. crist selƀo gibod
v.p: huand thu bist allaro kuningo craftigost crist selƀo gibod

v.m: uualdand uuarli co that he ni spraki thero uuordo than mer.
v.c: uualdand uuarlico that hie nispraki thero uuordo than mer .
v.p: uualdand uuarlico that hie ni spraki thero uuordo thanmer

v.m: Vuest thu that us so gi ri si d quad he allaro rehto gi huui li g
v.c: uuest thu that us girisit quat hie allaro rehto gihuilik
v.p: u uest thu that us so gerisiđ quad hie . allaro rehto gehuilic .

v.m: te gi fulleanne forduuardes nu.
v.c: tigifullanne for uuerdes nu
v.p: tegifulleanna forđuuardas Nu .

v.m: angodes uui lleon . I ohannes stod
v.c: an godes uuillon . iohannes stuod
v.p: aN godas uuilleaN giohannes stuod .

v.m: dopte allandag druhtfolc mi ki l.
v.c: dopta allan dag druht folc mikil .
v.p: dopti allan dag druht folc mikil .

v.m: uuerod anuuatere . endi og uualdand kri st
v.c: uuerod an uuatere endi oc ualdan crist
v.p: uuerodaN uuatara eNdiok uualdand crist .

v.m: heranhebeN cuni ng handun si nun
v.c: herren heƀan cuning handon sinon
v.p: herraN heƀaNkuning handuN sinum

v.m: an allaro bađo them bezton. endi i m thar te bedu gi hneg
v.c: an allero bethuo them beston endi im thar tebedu gihneg
v.p: aN allaro bađo them beztom eNdi im thar tebeda gihneg .

v.m: an cneo craftag kri st . up gi uuet .
v.c: ankneo craftig crist up giuuet
v.p: aN knio kraftag crist upp giuuet .

v.m: fagar fon them flode. fri dubarn godes.
v.c: fagar gan them flode friđu barn godes
v.p: fagar fan them fluoda friđubarn godas.

v.m: li of li udi o uuard. So he tho that land af stop .
v.c: liof liudeo uuard So hie thro that land of stuop
v.p: Liof liodo uuard so hie thuo that land af stuop .

v.m: so ant hli dun tho hi mi les doru . endi quam the helago gest .
v.c: so anthlidun thuo himiles duru endi quam the helago gest
v.p: [s ]duN thu[ ]las doru eNdi quã thie helago gest .

v.m: fon them alouualdon obane te kri ste .
v.c: fan them aluualdan oƀona tecriste .
v.p: fon them alouualdoN oƀana te crista .

v.m: uuas i m an gi li cni s si e i ungres fugles
v.c: uuas im angilicnesse lungras fugles
v.p: uuasim aN gelicnessia lungras (gitalas) fuglas .

v.m: di urli cara dubuN. endi .sat i m uppan uses drohti nes a(h)slu .
v.c: diurlicaro dufun endi satim uppan usses drohtines ahsla.
v.p: diurlicaro duƀoN eNdi sat im uppaN usas drohtinasahslo(N) .

v.m: uuonoda i mobar them uualdandes barne . Aftar quamthar uuord fon hi mi le.
v.c: uuonoda im oƀar them uualdandes barne after quam thar uuor(d;) fanhimile
v.p: UuuNoda im oƀorthem uualdan das barna aftar quã thar uuord fan himila .

v.m: hlud fon them hohon radura. en grotta thane helean selbon
v.c: hlud fan them hohon radore endi gruotta thena heland selƀon.
v.p: hlud faN them hohom radura eNdi gruotta thana heland selƀaN

v.m: kri st .allar cuni ngo bezton . quađ that he ina gi coranan habdi .
v.c: Crist allaro cuningo beston quat that hie ina gicoranan haƀdi
v.p: c ristaallaro kuningo beztoN quađ that hie ina gicoranaN habdi .

v.m: selbo fon si nun ri kea. quad that im the sunulicodi
v.c: selƀo fan sinon rikea quat that im thie suno licode
v.p: selƀo fan sium rikea quađ that im thie suno licodi .

v.m: bezt allaro giboranaro manno quad that he i m uuari allaro barni li obost .
v.c: best allero giboranero manno quat that hie im uuari allero barno leoƀost .
v.p: bezt allaro giboranaro manno quađ that he im uuari allaro barno liobost .

v.m: That moste i ohannes tho alsoi t goduuelde
v.c: That muosta iohannes all so it guod uuelda
v.p: That muosta giohanns thuo all so it god uuelda .

v.m: gi sehan.endi gi horean . he gi deda i t san afthar thi u
v.c: gisahan endi gihorean hie gideda it san after thiu
v.p: gisehaN eNdi gihoriaN hie gideda it saN aftar thiu .

v.m: maNnun mari that si e thar mahti gna
v.c: mannon mari that sia thar mahtina
v.p: mannom gimarid that sia thar mahtigana .

v.m: herron habdun . Thi t i s quad he heben cuni nges sunu .
v.c: herron haƀdun. That is quat hie heƀan cuninges suno
v.p: herroN habduN thitt is quađ hie heƀakuningas suno .

v.m: en alouualdand . thesas uui lleo i c urcundeo
v.c: enao uualdan theses uuilleo ik urkundeo
v.p: eN .alouualdand thesas uuilleo ik urkundeo .

v.m: uuesan an thesaro uueroldi . huuandi tsagdami uuordgodes.
v.c: uuesan anthesaro uueroldi huand it sagda mi uuord godes
v.p: uuesaN an thesaro uueroldi uuand it sagdami uuord godas .

v.m: drohti nestemne tho he mi dopean het
v.c: drohtines stemna thuo hie mi dopean hiet
v.p: drohtinas stemna thuo hie mi dopeaN hiet .

v.m: uueros an uuatare . so huuar soi cgi sahi uuarli co
v.c: uueros an uua tere sohuar so ik gisauui uuarlico
v.p: uuerosaN uuatara sohuar so ik gisauue uuarlico .

v.m: thana helagon gest .
v.c: thena helagna gest fan heƀan uange
v.p: thana helagon gest fan heƀanuuanga .

v.c: anthesan middil gard enigan man uuaron
v.p: a N thesaro middilgard enigaN maNN uuaroN .

v.c: Cuman midcraftu that quat scoldi crist uuesan
v.p: c umaN miđ craftu that quađ that scoldi crist uuesaN .

v.c: diurlic drohtines suno hie dopean scal
v.p: d iorlic drohtinas suno hie dopean scal .

v.m: endi helean managa
v.c: anthana helagan gest endi helean managa .
v.p: aN thana...
